data.summary: The exploratory step cannot be validated due to insufficient evidence regarding the scenario behavior.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aims to validate the outcome of the scenario 'Auto-offer when cancellation occurs', but there is no concrete evidence provided that demonstrates this functionality has been implemented or tested. The linked use cases and prior steps do not include any specific tests or results related to the auto-offer mechanism upon cancellation, leading to an inconclusive status. Therefore, the requirement cannot be confirmed as satisfied.
gaps: No evidence of auto-offer functionality upon cancellation.
